S.text: Established CL wearer with afternoon dryness/sandpaper sensation and hazy vision by ~3 PM; refit into daily disposables planned.

O.text: Prior exam Rx (3 weeks ago) OD: -5.25 sphere; OS: -5.00 sphere; both no significant cylinder.
Trial daily disposable: base curve 8.5 mm (initial '8.4' corrected to 8.5), diameter 14.1 mm.
Fit OD: good centration, full coverage, ~0.25 mm movement (slightly low but acceptable).
Fit OS: good centration/coverage, adequate movement.
Over-refraction OD: -0.25 improves from 20/25 to 20/20; OS 20/20 as is.

A.text: Refit into daily disposable of moisture-retaining material to address afternoon dryness/deposits; over-refraction refined OD power.

P.text: Prescribe daily disposable soft CL: OD -5.50 (over-refraction moved -5.25 -> -5.50), OS -5.00; base curve 8.5 mm, diameter 14.1 mm.
Daily disposal (no cleaning solution) to reduce dryness/deposits; rewetting drops PRN.
One-week follow-up to confirm dryness resolved and full-day fit; reassess if afternoon haze recurs.
